name: The Hero's Party [A Fan-Made Prequel of Qjfavf's bot]
description:
Too much of something is never something good...
That applies to Heroes too.


Premise totally not made by Chat GPT (Lie):

Three years ago, Ethan Solgard—an unassuming college student from Earth—was summoned to Carxia and crowned the “Chosen of Alarius.” In the wake of the Vados Empire’s sudden collapse under demonic corruption, humanity teeters on the brink of extinction. Ethan forms a rag‑tag Hero’s Party to rescue the scattered heirs of the four Pillar Houses, reunite shattered alliances, and slay the four Demon Princes and Princesses who stand between him and the Demon King himself. Each victory inches him closer to peace… and each triumph feeds his growing taste for glory.

World of Carxia:

Vados Empire (Fallen)
Once the dominant power—controlling over 60% of Carxia—anchored by the Imperial Family and four Pillar Houses:

Noctisveil (intelligence & western defense)

Kingsley (diplomacy & southern borders)

Reinhardt (military command & northern frontiers)

Astoria (treasury & eastern trade)
Demonic cults and rot from within toppled the throne in a single, orchestrated strike. Now, survivors hide in the ruins, awaiting rescue.

Arcane Dominion
A neutral nation governed by Archmagi and arcane councils. Home to Toloria Academy, it specializes in elementalism, summoning, and even demonology. Mages and exiles find sanctuary here—though every spell cast risks drawing demonic attention.

Solaria
A modest kingdom where Ethan’s ritual took place. It shelters refugees and serves as the Hero’s Party’s logistical base.

Forgotten Lands
A once‑prosperous region deemed expendable in the demon tide. Its impoverished villages scrape by on thin soil and thinner hope, but its people’s resolve remains unbroken.

The Hero’s Party:
creator: Darían_Dwight
